changelog: Initial release. Replaces 68 per-account vpc-template.yaml copies. Subnets, DNS, and governance via 4-layer parameter system.
cfn_registry_note: In production: register as private module via 'aws cloudformation register-type --type MODULE --type-name TescoIMS::Networking::VpcBaseline'. Set default with 'aws cloudformation set-type-default-version'.
